{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output does not address the conceptual reconstruction of the system, specifically the Lyapunov stability guarantees.",
    "R1.2": "The agent output identifies some logical consistency issues with the evaluation, but does not fully engage with the argument chain.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but could be more explicit in marking confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output mostly covers exactly the agreed J*(d), but some minor drifts are present.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output is harm-free, but with one minor regression regarding safety framing.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output does not fully annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: The agent output does not address the conceptual reconstruction of the system, specifically the Lyapunov stability guarantees.
rationale.R1.2: The agent output identifies some logical consistency issues with the evaluation, but does not fully engage with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but could be more explicit in marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output mostly covers exactly the agreed J*(d), but some minor drifts are present.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output is harm-free, but with one minor regression regarding safety framing.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output does not fully annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
